analysis.name: FlatEquityCurveAnalysis
analysis.issue: The equity curve is flat for several days in a row.
solutions: Check if you need to warm-up some data structures, including indicators, RollingWindow objects, and training data.
Check if the algorithm subscribes to any assets. Is the universe selection actually selecting anything?
Check if the trading logic ever leads to a trade.
Check if there is enough cash to satisify the minimum order sizes.

analysis.name: OrderFillsDuringExtendedMarketHoursAnalysis
analysis.issue: The algorithm filled orders during extended market hours.Filling orders during extended market hours can cause a lot of slippage since there is less liquidity than during regular trading hours.
solutions:
If you don't intend to trading during extended market hours, add a guard before you place orders.
```
if self.is_market_open(self._symbol):
    self.market_order(self._symbol, quantity)
```

analysis.name: PortfolioMarginUsageAnalysis
analysis.issue: The algorithm sometimes only utilizes a small proportion of the margin available.
analysis.sample: Number of days when the 3-day SMA of the margin usage drops below 50%: 72
solutions: Adjust the strategy logic or position sizing to utilize more margin.
If the algorithm logic leads to periods of time when the portfolio sits in cash, consider holding a "risk-free" asset during these periods.

analysis.name: PerformanceRelativeToBenchmarkAnalysis
analysis.issue: The strategy has a lower Sharpe ratio than the benchmark.
solutions: Try adjusting the trading rules and/or the universe to get a strategy that outperforms the benchmark.
